requested_items.objective: Test whether bf16/PWL exact-next losses are equal-score ranking losses recoverable by logit tie-breaking.

expected_result.reason: If logit tie-breaking recovers the zero-gap bf16/PWL misses without regressions, keep bf16/PWL as the low-cost frontier before full QAT or q12 fallback.

requested_items.notes: Merged via PR #347 and merge 74d8ff1fff2e3b131a33162a8a836a478ae09d51 at 2026-05-03T12:59:23.193309Z.
